retry_reason: Failure from refcount_inc_not_zero means the callback object's refcount reached zero (object is being freed/destroyed). Retrying cannot change this condition.

judge.reason: The primary purpose is timer cancellation, not reference-count management. The refcount_inc_not_zero is an internal safety measure to access the callback object, but the function does not transfer ownership of any reference-counted object to the caller; it only returns a status code. Significant business logic (hrtimer operations, async scheduling) is present.
